interface_order_constraint: Interfaces from earlier PBs are not changed by later PBs; changes require explicit evidence.
notes: PB-168 through PB-171 must not change these interfaces without evidence.
purpose: Build the runtime controller and execution boundary before downstream interfaces.
title: PB-167 VERIFIED: Runtime Controller & Execution Boundary

compile.summary: PASS using .venv/bin/python -m py_compile runtime/computer_use/*.py runtime/computer_use/providers/*.py; bare python unavailable in shell
